member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.HighPerformanceRepo`2
member.summary: Repositorio optimizado para alto rendimiento - miles de transacciones por segundo

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1
member.summary: Interfaz para operaciones de alto rendimiento optimizada para miles de transacciones por segundo

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkInsertAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserta miles de registros de forma optimizada usando bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkUpdateAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Actualiza miles de registros de forma optimizada

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkDeleteAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Elimina miles de registros de forma optimizada

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkDeleteAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Elimina registros por predicado usando bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkMergeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Operación de merge (insert/update) optimizada

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ProcessBatchAsync``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Procesa grandes volúmenes de datos en lotes para evitar problemas de memoria

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ProcessParallelAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Procesa datos en paralelo con control de concurrencia

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.StreamAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Obtiene datos en streaming para evitar cargar todo en memoria

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.GetPagedOptimizedAsync(Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Obtiene datos paginados optimizados para grandes volúmenes

member.summary: Ejecuta operación con métricas de rendimiento

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteWithMetricsAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Ejecuta operación con métricas de rendimiento y retorna resultado

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ConfigureForHighPerformance(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configura el contexto para operaciones de alto rendimiento

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ClearContextAsync
member.summary: Limpia el contexto para liberar memoria

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteInTransactionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Ejecuta operación en transacción optimizada para grandes volúmenes

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteDistributedTransactionAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task}[])
member.summary: Ejecuta múltiples operaciones en transacción distribuida

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.PerformanceMetrics
member.summary: Métricas de rendimiento para monitoreo

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1
member.summary:
Repository interface for entity operations.
Transaction Management: - Use IUnitOfWork for all transaction orchestration - Repositories obtained via IUnitOfWork.Repository<T>() automatically participate in UnitOfWork transactions

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteScalarFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar database function and returns the result.
member.typeparam: The return type of the scalar function.
member.param: Parameters to pass to the function.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteTableValuedFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a table-valued database function and returns the results.
member.typeparam: The entity type returned by the function.
member.param: Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: Enumerable of results from the table-valued function.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2
M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.#ctor(`1,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Repo.Repository.Interfaces.ICacheService,Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Optional whitelist for stored procedure validation.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ValidateStoredProcedureName(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a stored procedure or function name is allowed by the whitelist. If no whitelist is configured, validation passes for backward compatibility.
member.exception: Thrown when the name is not in the whitelist and validation is required.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBaseEnhanced`2
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] This class has been consolidated into RepoBase. Use instead. This wrapper is provided for backward compatibility and will be removed in a future version.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.EntityNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an entity is not found in the repository.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.RepositoryException
member.summary: Base exception for all repository-related errors.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a security validation fails, such as when a stored procedure or function is not in the whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.ProcedureNotWhitelisted(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a SecurityException for a non-whitelisted stored procedure or function.
member.param: The name of the procedure that was not whitelisted.
member.returns: A new SecurityException with a descriptive message.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for database function execution. These methods provide first-class support for scalar and table-valued database functions.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteScalarFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar database function and returns the result.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The return type of the scalar function.
member.param: The name of the database function.
Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: The scalar result from the function.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteTableValuedFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a table-valued database function and returns the results.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The entity type returned by the function.
member.param: The name of the database function.
Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: An enumerable of results from the table-valued function.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteAggregateFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Executes a built-in or user-defined aggregate function.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The return type of the aggregate.
member.param: The aggregate function name (e.g., COUNT, SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteWindowFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Executes a window function (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, etc.) over a result set.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The entity type with window function results.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Represents a paginated result set.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the result.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Data
member.summary: The paginated data items. This is the primary property.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] Use instead. This property is provided for backward compatibility.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Page
member.summary: The current page number (1-based). This is the primary property.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.PageNumber
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] Use instead. This property is provided for backward compatibility.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist
member.summary: Default implementation of . Validates stored procedure and function names against a configured whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The options containing the whitelist configuration.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.IsAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the specified stored procedure or function name is allowed. When whitelist is disabled (RequireWhitelist = false), all names are allowed. When whitelist is empty and disabled, all names are allowed for backward compatibility.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure or function to validate.
member.returns: True if the name is whitelisted or if whitelist validation is disabled; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.GetWhitelistedNames
member.summary: Gets all whitelisted stored procedure and function names.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of whitelisted names.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.ExtractProcedureName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the actual procedure name from a SQL command string. Handles formats like "EXEC sp_name @param" or "sp_name".

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist
member.summary: Defines the contract for validating stored procedure and function names against a whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist.IsAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the specified stored procedure or function name is allowed.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure or function to validate.
member.returns: True if the name is whitelisted; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist.GetWhitelistedNames
member.summary: Gets all whitelisted stored procedure and function names.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of whitelisted names.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for stored procedure and function whitelist validation.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.RequireWhitelist
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether whitelist validation is required. When set to false (default), all stored procedures and functions are allowed for backward compatibility. When set to true, only whitelisted procedures and functions are allowed.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.WhitelistedProcedures
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of whitelisted stored procedure and function names. Names are case-insensitive.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.ThrowOnValidationFailure
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to throw a SecurityException when validation fails. When set to true, a SecurityException is thrown for non-whitelisted procedures. When set to false, the validation passes without exception (for backward compatibility). Default is true when RequireWhitelist is true.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.AddWhitelistedProcedure(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a stored procedure or function name to the whitelist.
member.returns: The current options instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.AddWhitelistedProcedures(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds multiple stored procedure or function names to the whitelist.
member.returns: The current options instance for method chaining.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService
member.summary: Servicio de configuración de caché que permite elegir entre Redis y MemoryCache

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configura el servicio de caché según la disponibilidad de Redis

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddMemoryCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configura el servicio de caché forzando el uso de MemoryCache

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddRedisCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Configura el servicio de caché forzando el uso de Redis

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService
member.summary: Servicio de configuración para optimizar el rendimiento de la base de datos

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.ConfigureDbContext``1(``0)
member.summary: Configura DbContext para alto rendimiento

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.ConfigureSqlConnection(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection)
member.summary: Configura conexión SQL Server para alto rendimiento

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetBulkOperationConfig
member.summary: Obtiene configuración optimizada para bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetConcurrencyConfig
member.summary: Obtiene configuración de concurrencia

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetCacheConfig
member.summary: Obtiene configuración de caché

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetMonitoringConfig
member.summary: Obtiene configuración de monitoreo

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.BulkOperationConfig
member.summary: Configuración para operaciones bulk

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.ConcurrencyConfig
member.summary: Configuración de concurrencia

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfig
member.summary: Configuración de caché

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.MonitoringConfig
member.summary: Configuración de monitoreo

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork
M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.Repository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the specified entity type. Repositories obtained through this method participate in the UnitOfWork's transaction scope.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database. When inside a transaction, changes are persisted but not committed until CommitTransactionAsync is called.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with default isolation level. This is the PRIMARY method for starting transactions - use UnitOfWork, not repository methods.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with specified isolation level. Use this overload when you need explicit control over transaction isolation behavior.
member.param: The isolation level for the transaction (e.g., ReadCommitted, Serializable, Snapshot).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.CommitTransactionAsync
member.summary: Commits the current transaction. All changes made since BeginTransactionAsync are permanently saved.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.RollbackTransactionAsync
member.summary: Rolls back the current transaction. All changes made since BeginTransactionAsync are discarded.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.CurrentTransaction
member.summary: Gets the current database transaction if one is active. Returns null if no transaction is in progress.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.HasActiveTransaction
member.summary: Returns true if a transaction is currently active.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.CurrentTransaction
member.summary: Gets the current database transaction if one is active.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.HasActiveTransaction
member.summary: Returns true if a transaction is currently active.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.Repository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the specified entity type. Repositories participate in the UnitOfWork's transaction scope automatically.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.BeginTransactionAsync
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction. This is the PRIMARY method for starting transactions.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with specified isolation level.
member.param: The isolation level for the transaction.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.CommitTransactionAsync
member.summary: Commits the current transaction.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.RollbackTransactionAsync
member.summary: Rolls back the current transaction.
